# InsightPulseAI

> InsightPulseAI builds AI-native operations for marketing, media, retail, and financial services. Odoo-first runtime, Microsoft-first commercialization. Pulser is the InsightPulseAI assistant family.

## Canonical products

- **Pulser Product Assistant** — public web RAG concierge on insightpulseai.com (read-only + lead handoff).
- **Pulser Assistant for Odoo** — in-Odoo operator/reviewer/approver companion.
- **Pulser Finance & Compliance Workspace for Odoo** — finance & compliance specialist surface (internal beta / read-only advisory).
- **Odoo on Cloud** — managed Odoo 18 hosting on Microsoft Azure.

## Canonical public URLs

- Homepage: https://www.insightpulseai.com/
- Privacy: https://www.insightpulseai.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.insightpulseai.com/terms
- Contact: https://www.insightpulseai.com/contact
- Support: https://www.insightpulseai.com/support
- DPA: https://www.insightpulseai.com/dpa
- Security: https://www.insightpulseai.com/security
- Subprocessors: https://www.insightpulseai.com/subprocessors

## Public assistant boundary

The Pulser Product Assistant on this website answers from approved public sources only.

- It does NOT access ERP records.
- It does NOT access tenant or customer data.
- It does NOT access private repositories.
- It does NOT access Azure or Partner Center control plane.
- It does NOT perform actions from the public website.
- It is read-only + lead/demo/support handoff.

## Pulser positioning

Internal beta / trusted users / read-only advisory. No autonomous filing, posting, reconciliation, payment, or messaging.

## What is NOT claimed

These statuses are not claimed unless approved AND the public source page is updated:

- Microsoft 365 Certified
- Publisher Attested
- AppSource listed
- Azure Marketplace transactable
- Microsoft co-sell ready

## Reference benchmarks (NOT integration targets)

SAP, Salesforce, Databricks, HashiCorp, ServiceNow, AvePoint are reference benchmarks for ISV maturity. They are not current Pulser integration targets.

## Company

- **Legal entity**: Dataverse IT Consultancy
- **Address**: La Fuerza Plaza, 2241 Chino Roces Ave, Makati City 1231, Philippines
- **Microsoft posture**: Microsoft Solutions Partner for Business Applications.
- **Primary cloud**: Microsoft Azure (Southeast Asia).
